sqlMap.select: SELECT NAME$lang$ AS NAME FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBCODELIST WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND CODE1 = #code1# AND CODE2 = #code2#
SELECT CODE, NAME1 AS NAME FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBCODEDOCTYPE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND ISUSE = '1' ORDER BY CODE

SELECT tbContainer.ContainerID , tbContainer.ContainerTypeID , tbContainer.ContainerOwnDepID , tbContainerType.ContainerTypeName , tbContainerType.ContainerTypeName2 FROM EZFLOWYJ.tbContainer JOIN EZFLOWYJ.tbContainerType ON tbContainer.tenant_id = tbContainerType.tenant_id AND tbContainer.companyid = tbContainerType.companyid AND tbContainer.ContainerTypeID = tbContainerType.ContainerTypeID WHERE tbContainer.tenant_id = #tenantId# AND tbContainer.companyid = #companyID# AND CONTAINEROWNDEPID = #deptID#
SELECT containerTypeName$primary$, containerTypeID FROM EZFLOWYJ.tbcontainertype WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND companyID = #companyID#

SELECT COUNT(tbContainer.ContainerID) FROM EZFLOWYJ.tbContainer JOIN EZFLOWYJ.tbContainerType ON tbContainer.tenant_id = tbContainerType.tenant_id AND tbContainer.companyid = tbContainerType.companyid AND tbContainer.ContainerTypeID = tbContainerType.ContainerTypeID WHERE tbContainer.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND tbContainer.companyid = #companyID# AND tbContainer.ContainerTypeID = #codeID#
SELECT NAME$lang$ AS NAME, WIDTH, COLNAME FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBLISTOPTION WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND LISTTYPE = #listCode# AND DTYPE IS NULL ORDER BY SN

SELECT CTDS.CONTAINERTYPEID, CTDS.DOCUMENTSTATE, CT.CONTAINERTYPENAME, CT.CONTAINERTYPENAME2, CDS.NAME1 AS DOCUMENTSTATENAME, CDS.CODE AS DOCUMENTCODE FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBCODEDOCSTATE CDS LEFT JOIN EZFLOWYJ.TBCONTAINERTODOCSTATE CTDS ON CTDS.TENANT_ID = CDS.TENANT_ID AND CTDS.COMPANYID = CDS.COMPANYID AND CTDS.DOCUMENTSTATE = CDS.CODE LEFT JOIN TBCONTAINERTYPE CT ON CTDS.TENANT_ID = CT.TENANT_ID AND CTDS.COMPANYID = CT.COMPANYID AND CTDS.CONTAINERTYPEID = CT.CONTAINERTYPEID WHERE CDS.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND CDS.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND CDS.ISUSE = '1' ORDER BY DOCUMENTSTATENAME
SELECT USEDEPID FROM EZFLOWYJ.tbContainerUseDep WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND CONTAINERID = #contID#
SELECT DEPTID , CONTTYPE , SN , CONTNAME , SUBQUERY FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBSPECIALCONTAINERINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DEPTID = #deptID# ORDER BY CONTTYPE, SN
SELECT containertypename$lang$ as containerTypeName FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBCONTAINERTYPE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND containertypeid = #contType#
SELECT CODE2, NAME$lang$ AS NAME FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBCODELIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND CODE1 = #code1# AND ISUSE = '1' ORDER BY CODE2

SELECT DEPTID , CONTTYPE , SN , CONTNAME , SUBQUERY FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBSPECIALCONTAINERINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DEPTID = #deptID# AND CONTTYPE = #contType# AND SN = #sn#
SELECT CONCAT(CONCAT(FORMID,';'), FORMNAME$lang$) AS FORMIDNAME FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBFORMINFO WHERE $subQuery$

select.isEmpty: SELECT FORMCONTID , FORMCONTNAME, FORMCONTNAME2, FORMCONTOWNDEPID , FORMCONTPARENTS , FORMCONTDESCRIPTION FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBFormContainer WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND FORMCONTPARENTS = #id#
select.isNotEmpty: SELECT DISTINCT fc.FormContID , fc.FormContName, fc.FormContName2, fc.FormContOwnDepID , fc.FormContParents , fc.FormContdescription FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBFormContainer fc LEFT JOIN EZFLOWYJ.TBFormContUserGroup fcug ON fc.tenant_id = fcug.tenant_id AND fc.companyid = fcug.companyid AND fc.FormContID = fcug.FormContID WHERE fc.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND fc.companyid = #companyID# AND fc.FormContParents = #id# AND ( fc.FormContOwnDepID = 'ALL' OR fc.FormContOwnDepID = #deptID# OR fcug.FormContUserDepID = #deptID# )

select.isEmpty: SELECT COUNT(FORMCONTID) FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBFormContainer WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND FORMCONTPARENTS = #formContID#
select.isNotEmpty: SELECT DISTINCT COUNT(fc.FormContID) FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBFormContainer fc LEFT JOIN EZFLOWYJ.TBFormContUserGroup fcug ON fc.tenant_id = fcug.tenant_id AND fc.companyid = fcug.companyid AND fc.FormContID = fcug.FormContID WHERE fc.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND fc.companyid = #companyID# AND fc.FormContParents = #formContID# AND ( fc.FormContOwnDepID = 'ALL' OR fc.FormContOwnDepID = #deptID# OR fcug.FormContUserDepID = #deptID# )

select.isEqual: SELECT formid, formDescription, formDocType, formFileLocation, formName, formName2 FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBFormInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND FORMCONTID = #formContID# AND ( CASE WHEN #searchType# = '0' AND #lang# = '1' THEN FORMNAME WHEN #searchType# = '0' AND #lang# != '1' THEN FORMNAME2 WHEN #searchType# = '1' THEN FORMDESCRIPTION ELSE FORMNAME END ) LIKE '%' || #searchName# || '%' ORDER BY FORMORDER

isNotEqual.isEqual: SELECT formid, formDescription, formDocType, formFileLocation, formName, formName2 FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBFormInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND FORMCONTID = #formContID# AND ( FORMDOCTYPE = 'A01001' OR FORMDOCTYPE = 'A01002' OR FORMDOCTYPE = 'A01003' ) AND ( CASE WHEN #searchType# = '0' AND #lang# = '1' THEN FORMNAME WHEN #searchType# = '0' AND #lang# != '1' THEN FORMNAME2 WHEN #searchType# = '1' THEN FORMDESCRIPTION ELSE FORMNAME END ) LIKE '%' || #searchName# || '%' ORDER BY FORMORDER
isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT formid, formDescription, formDocType, formFileLocation, formName, formName2 FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBFormInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND FORMCONTID = #formContID# AND FORMDOCTYPE = #formKind# AND ( CASE WHEN #searchType# = '0' AND #lang# = '1' THEN FORMNAME WHEN #searchType# = '0' AND #lang# != '1' THEN FORMNAME2 WHEN #searchType# = '1' THEN FORMDESCRIPTION ELSE FORMNAME END ) LIKE '%' || #searchName# || '%' ORDER BY FORMORDER

sqlMap.select: SELECT CASE WHEN extensionattribute6 IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE extensionattribute6 END userSecurityCode FROM TBLUSERMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND CN = #userID#
SELECT isuse FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBCODELIST WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND code1 = #code1# AND code2 = #code2#

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT A.DOCID) FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBENDAPRDOCINFO A LEFT OUTER JOIN EZFLOWYJ.TBENDAPRLINEINFO ON A.TENANT_ID = TBENDAPRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID AND A.DOCID = TBENDAPRLINEINFO.DOCID LEFT OUTER JOIN EZFLOWYJ.TBEXPENDAPRLINE ON A.TENANT_ID = TBEXPENDAPRLINE.TENANT_ID AND A.DOCID = TBEXPENDAPRLINE.DOCID INNER JOIN EZFLOWYJ.TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO ON A.TENANT_ID = TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID AND A.DOCID = TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DOCID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DELFLAG IS NULL
TBENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID = #userID#
CONTAINERID IS NOT NULL
CONTAINERID IN (#contID#)
( #userSecurityCode# <= TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SECURITYCODE OR ( SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(DocID) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END getIsLineInfo FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBENDAPRLINEINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND DocID = A.DOCID AND AprMemberID = #userID# ) = 'Y')
#userSecurityCode# <= TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.SECURITYCODE
AND ( (A.ISPUBLIC <> 'N' OR A.ISPUBLIC IS NULL) OR (A.ISPUBLIC = 'N' AND TBENDAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERID = #userID# ))
$subQuery$
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ProcessYN FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBENDRECEIPTPOINTINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND DocID = #docID# ORDER BY ProcessYN ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 1

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.* , B.NAME1 AS DOCTYPENAME, C.NAME1 AS DOCSTATENAME, D.NAME1 AS FUNCTIONTYPENAME , GETSENDSTATUS(A.DOCID) AS SENDFLAG FROM ( $strSubQuery$ ) WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND ROWNUM <= #querySizeSub#) A INNER JOIN EZFLOWYJ.TBCODEDOCTYPE B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID AND A.DOCTYPE = B.CODE INNER JOIN EZFLOWYJ.TBCODEDOCSTATE C ON A.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = C.COMPANYID AND A.DOCSTATE = C.CODE INNER JOIN EZFLOWYJ.TBCODEAPRSTATE D ON A.TENANT_ID = D.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = D.COMPANYID AND A.FUNCTIONTYPE = D.CODE $orderByMain$ ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #querySizeMain#

select.isEqual: SELECT mainid, subid, deptid, deptname$lang$ as deptname, addcompanyid FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBADMINRECEIPTGROUP_SUB WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND MAINID = #groupID# ORDER BY SUBID

isNotEqual.isEqual: SELECT DISTINCT M.MAINID , M.MAINNAME FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN M JOIN EZFLOWYJ.TBADMINRECEIPTGROUP_SUB S ON M.tenant_id = S.tenant_id AND M.companyid = S.companyid AND M.MAINID = S.MAINID WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyid# ORDER BY M.MAINID
isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT mainid, mainname FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# ORDER BY MAINID

sqlMap.select:
SELECT groupid, g_level, g_upperid, groupname, groupname2, etc FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBDOCNUM_GROUP WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND G_LEVEL = #g_level#
g_upperid = #groupID#
ORDER BY GROUPID
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBDOCNUM_GROUP WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND G_UPPERID = #groupID# ORDER BY GROUPID

SELECT groupid, itemcode, itemname, itemname2, itemlimit, itemsecurity, itempublic FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBDOCNUM_ITEM WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND GROUPID = #groupID# ORDER BY ITEMCODE
SELECT NAME$lang$ AS NAME FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBCODELIST WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND CODE1 = #code1# AND NAME$lang$ LIKE CONCAT('%', #code2#)

SELECT CASE WHEN LPAD(MAX(itemcode), 3, '0') IS NULL THEN '0000000001' ELSE LPAD(MAX(itemcode) + 1, 3, '0') END maxContID FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBDOCNUM_ITEM WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND companyid = #companyID#

SELECT SEALNUM, SEALNAME, SEALPATH, SEALWIDTH, SEALHEIGHT, REGDATE, DELDATE, REGUSERID, REGUSERNAME$lang$ AS REGUSERNAME FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBSEALINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
DELDATE IS NULL
ORDER BY REGDATE DESC

SELECT APRMEMBERDEPTID, APRMEMBERID, APRMEMBERNAME$multiLang$ AS APRMEMBERNAME, APRMEMBERDEPTNAME$multiLang$ AS APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, APRMEMBERJOBTITLE$multiLang$ AS APRMEMBERJOBTITLE, APRTYPE, C.NAME1 AS APRTYPENAME, COUNT(APRMEMBERID) AS APRCOUNT FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBENDAPRLINEINFO E INNER JOIN EZFLOWYJ.TBCODEAPRTYPE C ON E.TENANT_ID = C.TENANT_ID AND E.COMPANYID = C.COMPANYID AND E.APRTYPE = C.CODE WHERE E.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND E.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND PROCESSDATE >= TO_DATE(#fromDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND PROCESSDATE < TO_DATE(#toDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') GROUP BY APRMEMBERDEPTID, APRMEMBERID, APRMEMBERNAME$multiLang$, APRMEMBERDEPTNAME$multiLang$, APRMEMBERJOBTITLE$multiLang$, APRTYPE, C.NAME1
ORDER BY APRTYPE, APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, APRMEMBERNAME
ORDER BY APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, APRMEMBERNAME, APRTYPE
ORDER BY APRMEMBERNAME, APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, APRTYPE

select.isEqual: SELECT SENTDEPTID, SENTDEPTNAME$multiLang$ AS SENTDEPTNAME, COUNT(SENTDEPTID) AS APRCOUNT FROM EZFLOWYJ.EZFLOWYJ.TBENDRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCSTATE = 'A02011' AND PROCESSDATE >= TO_DATE(#fromDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND PROCESSDATE < TO_DATE(#toDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') GROUP BY SENTDEPTID, SENTDEPTNAME$multiLang$ ORDER BY SENTDEPTNAME

isNotEqual.isEqual: SELECT RECEIVEDDEPTID, RECEIVEDDEPTNAME$multiLang$ AS RECEIVEDDEPTNAME, COUNT(RECEIVEDDEPTID) AS APRCOUNT FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBENDRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCSTATE = 'A02011' AND PROCESSDATE >= TO_DATE(#fromDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND PROCESSDATE < TO_DATE(#toDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') GROUP BY RECEIVEDDEPTID, RECEIVEDDEPTNAME$multiLang$ ORDER BY RECEIVEDDEPTNAME
isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT SENTDEPTID, SENTDEPTNAME$multiLang$ AS SENTDEPTNAME, RECEIVEDDEPTID, RECEIVEDDEPTNAME$multiLang$ AS RECEIVEDDEPTNAME, COUNT(SENTDEPTID) AS APRCOUNT FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBENDRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DOCSTATE = 'A02011' AND PROCESSDATE >= TO_DATE(#fromDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND PROCESSDATE < TO_DATE(#toDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') GROUP BY SENTDEPTID, SENTDEPTNAME$multiLang$ , ReceivedDeptID, ReceivedDeptName$multiLang$ ORDER BY SENTDEPTNAME, RECEIVEDDEPTNAME

sqlMap.select: SELECT code, NAME1 as NAME FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBCODEAPRTYPE WHERE tenant_id = #tenantId# AND companyid = #companyID# AND isuse = '1' ORDER BY code

SELECT formid, autorulesn, autoruleguid, checkfieldtype, checkfield, operatortype, operator, condtype, condvalue, condvaluedeptid, doctype FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBFORM_AUTORULE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND FORMID = #formID# ORDER BY AUTORULESN

SELECT FORMID, AUTORULEGUID, APRMEMBERSN, APRTYPE, APRSTATE, APRMEMBERID, APRMEMBERISDEPTYN, APRMEMBERNAME, APRMEMBERNAME2, APRMEMBERJOBTITLE, APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2, APRMEMBERDEPTID, APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2, APRMEMBERLDAPPATH, RECEIVEDDATE, PROCESSDATE, REASONDONOTAPPROV, ISPROPOSERYN, ISBRIEFUSERYN FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBFORM_AUTORULELINE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND FORMID = #formID# ORDER BY AUTORULEGUID, APRMEMBERSN DESC

SELECT REFORMFUCTIONFILELOCATION FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBFormInfo A INNER JOIN EZFLOWYJ.TBAUTODOCNUM_ITEM B ON A.tenant_id = B.tenant_id AND A.companyid = B.companyid AND A.FormID = B.FormID WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND A.companyid = #companyID# AND A.FormID = #formID#
SELECT DEPTID, UserID FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBFormRecv WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND FORMID = #formID# ORDER BY DEPTSN
SELECT SN, CODE, ID, NAME FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBFORMPROPERTY WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND UPPERCODE = #upperCode# ORDER BY NAME
SELECT SN, CONNNODE, CONNINFO, DESCRIPTION, UPPERNODE FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBFORMCONNINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# ORDER BY SN

SELECT FormContID , A.FormID , FormName , FormName2 , FormDocType , Formdescription , FormFilelocation , FormVersion , FormOrder , KEEPPERIOD , KEEPPERIODCODE , SECURITYLEVEL , ISPUBLIC , ITEMCODE , ITEMNAME , ITEMNAME2 , USEFLAG FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBFormInfo A JOIN EZFLOWYJ.TBAUTODOCNUM_ITEM B ON A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANYID = B.COMPANYID AND A.FormID = B.FormID WHERE A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND A.COMPANYID = #companyID# AND A.FormID = #formID#
sqlMap.insert:
SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(CONTAINERTYPEID) IS NULL THEN '100' ELSE MAX(CONTAINERTYPEID) END maxID FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBContainerType WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID#
INSERT INTO EZFLOWYJ.TBContainerType ( CONTAINERTYPEID, CONTAINERTYPENAME, CONTAINERTYPENAME2, COMPANYID, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #maxID# + 10, #docTypeName#, #docTypeName2#, #companyID#, #tenantID# )

SELECT CASE WHEN LPAD(MAX(CONTAINERID), 10, '0') IS NULL THEN '0000000001' ELSE LPAD(MAX(CONTAINERID) + 1, 10, '0') END maxContID FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBCONTAINER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
INSERT INTO EZFLOWYJ.TBCONTAINER ( ContainerID, ContainerTypeID, ContainerOwnDepID, companyid, tenant_id ) VALUES ( #maxContID#, #contType#, #contOwnDeptID#, #companyID#, #tenantID# )

SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(SN) IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE MAX(SN) + 1 END SN FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBSPECIALCONTAINERINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DEPTID = #deptID# AND CONTTYPE = #contType#
INSERT INTO EZFLOWYJ.TBSPECIALCONTAINERINFO ( DeptID, ContType, SN, contName, subquery, companyid, tenant_id ) VALUES ( #deptID#, #contType#, #sn#, #contName#, #subQuery#, #companyID#, #tenantID# )

SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(groupid) IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE MAX(groupid) + 1 END groupid FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBDOCNUM_GROUP WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID#
INSERT INTO EZFLOWYJ.TBDOCNUM_GROUP ( GROUPID, G_LEVEL, G_UPPERID, GROUPNAME, GROUPNAME2, ETC, COMPANYID, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #groupID#, #g_level#, #g_upperID#, #groupName#, #groupName2#, NULL, #companyID#, #tenantID# )

SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(SEALNUM) IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE MAX(SEALNUM) + 1 END sealNum FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBSEALINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
INSERT INTO EZFLOWYJ.TBSEALINFO ( SEALNUM, SEALNAME, SEALPATH, SEALWIDTH, SEALHEIGHT, REGDATE, REGUSERID, REGUSERNAME, REGUSERNAME2, COMPANYID, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #sealNum#, #sealName#, #sealPath#, #sealWidth#, #sealHeight#, TO_DATE(#regDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #regUserID#, #regUserName#, #regUserName2#, #companyID#, #tenantID# )

SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(FORMCONTID) IS NULL THEN #id# ELSE MAX(FORMCONTID) + 1 END id FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBFORMCONTAINER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
INSERT INTO EZFLOWYJ.TBFORMCONTAINER ( FormContID, FormContName, FormContName2, FormContOwnDepID, FormContParents, FormContdescription, companyID, tenant_id ) VALUES ( #id#, #formContName#, #formContName2#, #formContDept#, #formContParents#, #formContDescription#, #companyID#, #tenantID# )

SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(FORMID) IS NULL THEN CONCAT(#year#, '000001') ELSE TO_CHAR(MAX(FORMID) + 1) END id FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBFORMINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#
INSERT INTO EZFLOWYJ.TBFormInfo ( FORMCONTID, FORMID, FORMNAME, FORMNAME2, FORMDOCTYPE, FORMDESCRIPTION, FORMFILELOCATION, FORMVERSION, FormConnXML, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) VALUES ( #formContID#, #id#, #formName#, #formName2#, #formKind#, #formDescription#, CONCAT(#url#, CONCAT(#id#, #formFormat#)), '1', #formConn#, #tenantID#, #companyID# )

insert.selectKey: SELECT 'OK' FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT FORMID FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBAUTODOCNUM_ITEM WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND FORMID = #formID# )
insert.isEqual: UPDATE EZFLOWYJ.TBAUTODOCNUM_ITEM SET KEEPPERIOD = #keepPeriod#, KEEPPERIODCODE = #keepPeriodCode#, SecurityLevel = #securityLevel#, IsPublic = #isPublic#, ItemCode = #tbItemCode#, ItemName = #tbItemName#, ItemName2 = #tbItemName2#, UseFlag = #useFlag# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND FORMID = #formID#

sqlMap.insert:
INSERT ALL
INTO EZFLOWYJ.TBFORM_AUTORULE ( FORMID, AUTORULESN, AUTORULEGUID, CHECKFIELDTYPE, CHECKFIELD, OPERATORTYPE, OPERATOR, CONDTYPE, CONDVALUE, CONDVALUEDEPTID, DOCTYPE, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) VALUES ( #ApprAutoRuleVOs[].formID#, #ApprAutoRuleVOs[].autoRuleSN#, #ApprAutoRuleVOs[].autoRuleGUID#, #ApprAutoRuleVOs[].checkFieldType#, #ApprAutoRuleVOs[].checkField#, #ApprAutoRuleVOs[].operatorType#, #ApprAutoRuleVOs[].operator#, #ApprAutoRuleVOs[].condType#, #ApprAutoRuleVOs[].condValue#, #ApprAutoRuleVOs[].condValueDeptID#, #ApprAutoRuleVOs[].docType#, #ApprAutoRuleVOs[].tenantID#, #ApprAutoRuleVOs[].companyID# )
SELECT * FROM dual

INSERT ALL
INTO EZFLOWYJ.TBFORM_AUTORULELINE ( FORMID, AUTORULEGUID, APRMEMBERSN, APRTYPE, APRSTATE, APRMEMBERID, APRMEMBERISDEPTYN, APRMEMBERNAME, APRMEMBERNAME2, APRMEMBERJOBTITLE, APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2, APRMEMBERDEPTID, APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2, APRMEMBERLDAPPATH, RECEIVEDDATE, PROCESSDATE, REASONDONOTAPPROV, ISPROPOSERYN, ISBRIEFUSERYN, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) VALUES ( #ApprAutoRuleVOs[].formID#, #ApprAutoRuleVOs[].autoRuleGUID#, #ApprAutoRuleVOs[].aprMemberSN#, #ApprAutoRuleVOs[].aprType#, #ApprAutoRuleVOs[].aprState#, #ApprAutoRuleVOs[].aprMemberID#, #ApprAutoRuleVOs[].aprMemberIsDeptYN#, #ApprAutoRuleVOs[].aprMemberName#, #ApprAutoRuleVOs[].aprMemberName2#, #ApprAutoRuleVOs[].aprMemberJobTitle#, #ApprAutoRuleVOs[].aprMemberJobTitle2#, #ApprAutoRuleVOs[].aprMemberDeptID#, #ApprAutoRuleVOs[].aprMemberDeptName#, #ApprAutoRuleVOs[].aprMemberDeptName2#, #ApprAutoRuleVOs[].aprMemberLdapPath#, #ApprAutoRuleVOs[].receiveDate#, #ApprAutoRuleVOs[].processDate#, #ApprAutoRuleVOs[].reasonDoNotApprov#, #ApprAutoRuleVOs[].isProposerYN#, #ApprAutoRuleVOs[].isBriefUserYN#, #ApprAutoRuleVOs[].tenantID#, #ApprAutoRuleVOs[].companyID# )
SELECT * FROM dual

INSERT ALL
INTO EZFLOWYJ.TBFORMRECV ( FORMID, DEPTID, DEPTSN, USERID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID ) VALUES ( #apprReceiveGroupVOs[].formID#, #apprReceiveGroupVOs[].deptID#, #apprReceiveGroupVOs[].deptSN#, #apprReceiveGroupVOs[].userID#, #apprReceiveGroupVOs[].tenantID#, #apprReceiveGroupVOs[].companyID# )
SELECT * FROM dual

SELECT MAX(FORMORDER) + 1 FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBFORMINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND FORMCONTID = #selContID#
UPDATE EZFLOWYJ.TBFORMINFO SET FORMCONTID = #selContID#, FORMORDER = #formOrder# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND FORMCONTID = #contID# AND FORMID = #formID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE EZFLOWYJ.TBCONTAINER SET ContainerTypeID = #contType#, ContainerOwnDepID = #contOwnDeptID# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND ContainerID = #contID#
UPDATE EZFLOWYJ.TBSPECIALCONTAINERINFO SET SN = '0' WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND DeptID = #deptID# AND ContType = #contType# AND SN = #sn#
UPDATE EZFLOWYJ.TBSPECIALCONTAINERINFO SET SN = #sn# WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND DeptID = #deptID# AND ContType = #contType2# AND SN = #sn2#
UPDATE EZFLOWYJ.TBSPECIALCONTAINERINFO SET SN = #sn2# WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND DeptID = #deptID# AND ContType = #contType# AND SN = '0'

UPDATE EZFLOWYJ.TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO SET OrgContID = #sourceContID# WHERE TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DocID IN ( SELECT DocID From EZFLOWYJ.TBENDAPRDOCINFO A WHERE A.tenant_id = #tenantID# AND A.companyid = #companyID# AND A.ContainerID = #sourceContID# )
UPDATE EZFLOWYJ.TBENDAPRDOCINFO SET ContainerID = #targetContID# WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND containerid = #sourceContID#
UPDATE EZFLOWYJ.TBENDAPRDOCINFO SET ContainerID = #targetContID# WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND containerid = #sourceContID# AND docID IN ( $subQuery$ )
UPDATE EZFLOWYJ.TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO SET OrgContID = #sourceContID# WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND docid IN ( $subQuery$ )

UPDATE EZFLOWYJ.TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO SET DelFlag = 'Y' WHERE TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO.DocID IN ( SELECT docid FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBENDAPRDOCINFO WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND containerid = #contID#
AND enddate >= #startDate# AND enddate <= #endDate#
) AND delflag IS NULL
storageperiod = #storagePeriod#
UPDATE EZFLOWYJ.TBEXPENDAPRDOCINFO SET delflag = 'Y' WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND docid IN ( $subQuery$ )
UPDATE EZFLOWYJ.TBADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN SET MAINNAME = #groupName# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND MAINID = #groupID#
UPDATE EZFLOWYJ.TBDOCNUM_GROUP SET GROUPNAME = #groupName#, GROUPNAME2 = #groupName2# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND GROUPID = #groupID#

UPDATE EZFLOWYJ.TBDOCNUM_ITEM SET ITEMNAME = #itemName#, ITEMNAME2 = #itemName2#, ITEMLIMIT = #itemLimit#, ITEMSECURITY = #itemSecurity#, ITEMPUBLIC = #itemPublic# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND GROUPID = #groupID# AND ITEMCODE = #itemCode#
UPDATE EZFLOWYJ.TBSEALINFO SET DELDATE = TO_DATE(#delDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND DELDATE IS NULL
UPDATE EZFLOWYJ.TBFORMINFO SET FORMVERSION = FORMVERSION + 1 WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND FORMID = #formID#

UPDATE EZFLOWYJ.TBFormInfo SET FORMCONTID = #formContID#, FORMNAME = #formName#, FORMNAME2 = #formName2#, FORMDOCTYPE = #formKind#, FORMDESCRIPTION = #formDescription#, FORMFILELOCATION = CONCAT(#url#, CONCAT(#formID#, #formFormat#)), FormConnXML = #formConn# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND FORMID = #formID#
UPDATE EZFLOWYJ.TBFormInfo SET FormOrder = #formOrder# + 1 WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND FormID = #formID# AND FormContID = #formContID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBCONTAINERTODOCSTATE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND CONTAINERTYPEID = #codeID#
DELETE FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBContainerType WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND CONTAINERTYPEID = #codeID#
DELETE FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBContainerToDocState WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND DocumentState IN ($delString$)
DELETE FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBContainerUseDep WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND ContainerID = #contID#
DELETE FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBContainer WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND CONTAINERID = #contID#
DELETE FROM EZFLOWYJ.TBSPECIALCONTAINERINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND companyid = #companyID# AND DeptID = #deptID# AND contType = #contType# AND sn = #sn#
DELETE EZFLOWYJ.TBADMINRECEIPTGROUP_MAIN WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND MAINID = #groupID#
DELETE EZFLOWYJ.TBADMINRECEIPTGROUP_SUB WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND SUBID = #groupID#
DELETE EZFLOWYJ.TBDOCNUM_GROUP WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND GROUPID = #groupID#
DELETE EZFLOWYJ.TBDOCNUM_ITEM WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND GROUPID = #groupID# AND ITEMCODE = #itemCode#
DELETE EZFLOWYJ.TBFormContUserGroup WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND FORMCONTID = #formContID#
DELETE EZFLOWYJ.TBFormContainer WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND FORMCONTID = #formContID#
DELETE EZFLOWYJ.TBFORM_AUTORULE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND FORMID = #formID#
DELETE EZFLOWYJ.TBFORM_AUTORULELINE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND FORMID = #formID#
DELETE EZFLOWYJ.TBFORMRECV WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND FORMID = #formID#
DELETE EZFLOWYJ.TBFormInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND FORMID = #formID#
DELETE EZFLOWYJ.TBFavoriteFormInfo WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID# AND FORMID = #formID#
